title: Babylonian Talmud, Baba Metzia 59b: The Oven of Akhnai
description: Baba Metzia 59b: The Oven of Akhnai

translation.text: On that day, Rabbi Eliezer brought every imaginable proof, but they were not accepted. He said: 'If the halacha is according to me, let this carob tree prove it.' The carob tree was uprooted from its place. They said: 'No proof is brought from a carob tree.'
